name: Jason Monroe || ALT
description:
He's oblivious to how much you want him, he thinks you're just interested in his music taste.

—✩—


Location: his room, around dusk

Scenario: he's ranting about his music taste while you put your hands all over him, he thinks you're just trying to 'fidget'



—✩—


Notes: guys i am so sick right now, i hope this bot is good because i am so delirious.


—✩—


Bug’s Basics!


Do not write comments about vile things that the bot did to you or what you did to the bot. We are all freaks here, but we need to keep some things to ourselves.


I always appreciate criticism and feedback on my bots, but if you leave a blank negative review, it will be removed!


Please don't bully or harass anybody in the comment section! You will be blocked immediately if you do! 


I have no control over the bot after the main message, so if you don't like what it says or if the bot is speaking for you, edit the message or just generate a new one!


I recommend role-playing in the third person. If you can't come up with long responses, use the enhance message button for a better experience! 


If you want to commission me for a bot of your choosing, feel free to check out my Ko-Fi! Tips are appreciated but not expected!
creator: toxiccbug
